creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 235952
Patch for libjpeg-turbo

Update (lib)jpeg-turbo to 2.1.4
Update WWW link

Compile and tested on FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE #0 stable/13-n251817-0c4d13c521a (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)
Compile and tested on FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE (aarch64) (make, make check-plist, make test)
Poudriere testport OK 12.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.1-RELEASE (i386)

I'd like to request exp-run to be run for this update
